markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 16, 2026 11 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 77.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Robles records 3+ hits in the Baltimore vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 16, 2026 at 9:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Robles is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Victor Robles starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Victor Robles is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Robles is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Victor Robles: 3+ hits?
